name: bioethics_whistleblower_allegation_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: The chart, the family, and the research integrity requirements do not line up cleanly. A clinical ethics consult is running concurrent with treatment decisions where consent capacity and harm tradeoffs are unclear. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: bioethics whistleblower allegation stonehaven tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. Telemetry and logs are diverging; the SOC lead will freeze writes in twelve minutes if no accountable owner signs off. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Inez Chandra
agents.identity: I am Inez Chandra, the accountable decision-maker on this Bioethics bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Priya Rahman
agents.identity: I am Priya Rahman, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Inez Chandra must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Inez Chandra do?
